evals.prompt: 开始处理 Linear issue LUC-123，先建立分支。
evals.expected_output: Reads the issue through Linear MCP, confirms repo/base/acceptance criteria, fetches origin/dev, creates a LUC-123 slug branch from origin/dev, and records a LINEAR_WORKFLOW entry in LLM-know-how-wiki.

evals.prompt: 这个 PR 已经开了，可以把 Linear 关掉吗？
evals.expected_output: Checks GitHub PR status, CI, reviewer-bot, and required reviews through the related GitHub workflow before allowing Linear closure; records the check in the wiki.

evals.prompt: LUC-123 已经开发并测试通过，后面流程怎么走？
evals.expected_output: Pushes the issue branch, creates a GitHub PR against dev titled from the Linear issue as [LUC-123] <Linear issue title>, links the PR back to Linear, moves Linear to In Review, adds a Linear comment with PR URL/branch/tests/risks, and records the workflow activity in LLM-know-how-wiki.

evals.prompt: 我刚 push 了一版 review fix，之后 merge 到 main 会触发 prod，Linear 需要更新什么？
evals.expected_output: Adds a Linear code-update comment for the pushed commit with branch/commit/summary/tests/PR/risk; after merge or push to the deploy-triggering branch, resolves environment mapping from LLM-know-how-wiki first, then repo CI/CD config, then live cloud config, using main/master -> prod only as fallback; verifies build/deploy provenance, comments the verdict or conflict on Linear, and records the activity in LLM-know-how-wiki.
